base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of tile_bridge_wooden — a tile from 1986 legend of zelda. Wooden bridge — horizontal + vertical variants across rivers. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Wooden bridge — horizontal + vertical variants across rivers
